schemas.name: Crontab Guru
schemas.description: Quick and simple editor for cron schedule expressions. Test your cron schedules, validate cron expressions, get plain English explanations, and see the next 10 run times instantly.

mainEntity.name: What does the cron expression 0 0 1-7 * 0 mean?

acceptedAnswer.text: This runs at midnight on the first Sunday of each month. It works by matching any Sunday (day 0) that falls between the 1st and 7th of the month — which is always the first Sunday. Note: in some cron implementations, day-of-month and day-of-week are ORed, not ANDed.

mainEntity.name: How do I read a cron expression?

acceptedAnswer.text: A cron expression has 5 fields: minute, hour, day-of-month, month, day-of-week. Read left to right: '0 9 * * 1' means 'at minute 0, hour 9, any day, any month, on Monday' = every Monday at 9:00 AM. Paste any expression above to decode it automatically.
